## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Change is public-safe and uses no private data.
- [ ] Relevant validator/test command passes.
- [ ] README or docs updated if behavior changes.

## Suggested validation command

```bash
python -m unittest discover -s tests -p 'test*.py'
```
